rejected.reason: Signal fires on both Yes and No sides of same market when legendary traders are split (78% of markets). Paired signals contribute exactly 50% by construction. 7-30 day horizon below random baseline (42.9%). Signal adds no predictive value over market price as currently defined.
rejected.do_not_retry_without: Pre-registered STR-001b hypothesis with exclusive convergence filter (3+ on one side, <3 on other). quant-research-agent owns this. Oscar must approve hypothesis before backtest-agent retests.

scout_cycles.notes: Tenth scout cycle (Thursday). 4 findings from ~15 evaluated items. Self-improvement catch: arXiv:2605.02801 was re-evaluated and discarded again (same paper discarded cycle 9) — caught before filing via feedback.json history check. Key findings: (1) PolyBench — first rigorous LLM benchmark on live Polymarket, only 2/7 models profitable, overconfidence is the failure mode; (2) PredictionMarketBench — execution-realistic LOB backtesting from Feb 2026, Kalshi-based but directly portable, validates limit-orders-only rule; (3) Forecasting Economy dataset — comprehensive Polymarket 2020-2026 data at polymonitor.club, 943M fill records vs our position-level tracking; (4) Claude Agent SDK native features — subagents/hooks/checkpoints shipped, validates our architecture independently. HuggingFace very low signal today. Karpathy autoresearch has been inactive for 6+ weeks — deprioritise from daily checks; recheck monthly per self-assessment protocol.
